name: Gumball
description: Candy-machine gumballs caught mid-tumble — every sphere keeps its glossy highlight while the colors and sizes reshuffle per redraw.

code.style: --candy: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: @rand(58%, 82%); left: 9%; top: 9%; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--candy); box-shadow: calc(10px / @Y) calc(16px / @Y) 0 rgba(60, 30, 10, 0.12); transition: ease 600ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: @rand(12%, 18%); left: 26%; top: 20%; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85); transition: ease 600ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
